understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' to complete each level and ultimately win the game. Each level requires navigating the grid from the starting position to the goal while avoiding hazards.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Horizontal movement (MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT) is followed by an automatic vertical fall in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid tile, hitting a spike, or reaching the goal. DOWN gravity pulls the player toward lower y-values (toward the top of the grid). CLICK removes breakable 'x' tiles at the specified coordinates, opening new fall paths. Spike tiles ('u'/'v') end the run instantly. UNDO reverses the last action. Each attempt has a turn limit (50 moves), and each level allows 2 attempts.
